creator: mason@blisses.org
text:
Allan,

It's been a while, but I don't remember that helping.

That said, at least as of FreeBSD 12 the "geom_eli_passphrase_prompt"
option that came in with 10.2 appears to be default, and I've yet to
encounter an issue with this option, using the same keyboard that had an 
issue when the password prompt was presented during boot, instead of before 
the splash screen.

I'll close this to clean it up, as the default configuration works around 
the issue. I should look at other bugs I've opened and see how many have 
aged out - thanks for poking this.
